# Retail Sales Analysis

This project analyzes retail sales data using Python, Pandas, NumPy, and Matplotlib.

## Project Objective

The goal is to perform Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA) on retail sales data and generate business insights.

## Skills Demonstrated

- Data Cleaning
- Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA)
- Feature Engineering
- Data Visualization
- Business Insights
- Git & GitHub

## Project Structure

Retail-Sales-Analysis/
├── data/
├── notebooks/
├── src/
├── images/
├── requirements.txt
└── README.md

## Tools Used

- Python
- Pandas
- NumPy
- Matplotlib
- Jupyter Notebook
- Git
- GitHub
